# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security


parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "myVNet"
  resourceGroupName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "myResourceGroup"
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "eastus"

variables:
  vnetId: "[resourceId(parameters('resourceGroupName'), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  storageServiceEndpoint: "Microsoft.Storage"
  sqlServiceEndpoint: "Microsoft.Sql"

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - "10.0.0.0/16"
    subnets:
      - name: "default"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/24"
          serviceEndpoints:
            - type: "[variables('storageServiceEndpoint')]"
              locations:
                - "[parameters('location')]"
            - type: "[variables('sqlServiceEndpoint')]"
              locations:
                - "[parameters('location')]"
          delegations:
            - name: "StorageAccount"
              properties:
                serviceName: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
                actions:
                  - "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/join/action"
                  - "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/prepareNetworkPolicies/action"
                  - "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/unprepareNetworkPolicies/action"

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "mystorageaccount"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    accessTier: "Hot"
    allowBlobPublicAccess: true
    allowCrossTenantReplication: false
    allowSharedKeyAccess: true
    defaultToOAuthAuthentication: false
    encryption:
      keySource: "Microsoft.Storage"
      services:
        blob:
          enabled: true
          keyType: "Account"
        file:
          enabled: true
          keyType: "Account"
    isHnsEnabled: false
    networkAcls:
      bypass: "AzureServices"
      defaultAction: "Allow"
      ipRules: []
      virtualNetworkRules:
        - id: "[variables('vnetId')]"
          action: "Allow"
    supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
  apiVersion: "2020-11-01-preview"
  name: "mysqlserver"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    administratorLogin: "adminuser"
    administratorLoginPassword: "SecurePassword123!"
    version: "12.0"
    publicNetworkAccess: "Enabled"
    administrators:
      administratorType: "ActiveDirectory"
      login: "adminuser"
      sid: "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
    serverVersion: "12.0"
    byok: false
    byokStatus: "NotConfigured"
    byokStatusMessage: ""
    byokStatusDetails: ""
    byokStatusTimestamp: ""
    byokStatusUser: ""
    byokStatusUserEmail: ""
    byokStatusUserDisplayName: ""
    byokStatusUserObjectId: ""
    byokStatusUserTenantId: ""
    byokStatusUserPrincipalName: ""
    byokStatusUserType: ""
